caption: A woman and a man are recording a podcast in a studio setting. The woman, seen in the first frame, wears a dark green t-shirt with a red Greek key pattern and has her hair in a high bun. She sits behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. The man, appearing in the remaining frames, wears a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering, and a gold watch. He also sits before a microphone. The background features a white banner with blue stars and the text "HUSTLE" repeated vertically, along with the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!". A logo for "BOSS TALK 101" is visible on the banner and as an on-screen overlay. The scene transitions from a medium shot of the woman to a medium shot of the man, who remains relatively still, looking slightly off-camera.
